pi_items.source: docker-compose.yml shows /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web is mounted as /config in web container; docker-jitsi-meet documentation confirms web startup script appends custom-config.js to config.js via /web/rootfs/etc/cont-init.d/10-config
setup_jitsi.sh lines 40-42 explicitly create this directory and copy docker-compose.yml there
Jitsi Meet documentation confirms defaultLanguage is a valid configuration option that accepts language codes like 'fr' for French
Jitsi Meet documentation confirms requireDisplayName is a valid boolean configuration option that forces users to enter a display name
Jitsi Meet configuration documentation confirms startWithAudioMuted is a valid boolean option controlling initial audio mute state
Jitsi Meet configuration documentation confirms startWithVideoMuted is a valid boolean option controlling initial video mute state
Jitsi Meet configuration documentation references disableDeepLinking as a valid configuration option
Jitsi Meet configuration documentation confirms disableThirdPartyRequests is a valid boolean option for disabling third-party service requests
Jitsi Meet configuration documentation confirms enableWelcomePage is a valid boolean option controlling welcome page display

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims have been verified as correct. The config_path '/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js' is the correct location for custom Jitsi Meet configuration, as it is mounted to '/config' in the web container and the entrypoint script automatically appends custom-config.js to the generated config.js file. The docker_dir '/home/ga/jitsi' is correctly established by setup_jitsi.sh. All seven configuration parameters (defaultLanguage='fr', requireDisplayName, startWithAudioMuted, startWithVideoMuted, disableDeepLinking, disableThirdPartyRequests, enableWelcomePage) are valid and commonly used Jitsi Meet configuration options. The data is real (non-synthetic) and drawn from the official Jitsi Meet docker-jitsi-meet project and Jitsi documentation.
